# CDE/PII Tagging Report: raw-ingest-college-scorecard-institution
**Date:** 2026-04-14
**Agent:** @cde-tagger
**Registry document:** `governance/cde-registry/raw-ingest-college-scorecard-institution-cdes.md`
**Contract target:** `governance/data-contracts/raw-college-scorecard-institution.yaml` *(to be generated by @doc-generator)*
**Zone:** Bronze (Raw)
**Table:** `raw.college_scorecard_institution`

### Domain Context Referenced
- `governance/domain-context.md` — Higher Education Outcomes domain. UNITID is auto-approved as CDE (authoritative IPEDS identifier). Zero PII expected at institution/aggregate grain.
- `governance/pii-scans/raw-ingest-college-scorecard-institution-pii-scan.md` — Classification: **NO PII**. All 28 fields are Level 1 — Public. Public federal data; FERPA protections applied upstream by IPEDS before publication.
- `docs/specs/raw-ingest-college-scorecard-institution.md` — Establishes that `net_price_annual` and `cost_of_attendance_annual` drive the new ROI formula; CONTROL is the switch that selects `NPT4_PUB` vs `NPT4_PRIV` and the `NPT41..45_PUB/PRIV` quintile series. Introduces BT-110 (Cost of Attendance), BT-111 (Net Price), BT-112 (Net Price by Income Quintile).
- `docs/specs/roi-formula-cost-of-attendance.md` — Downstream consumer. ROI formula rewrites to `earnings / (net_price_annual × 4 × loan_pct)` with a `debt_median` fallback. Promotes the institution-level cost fields from descriptive to denominator-driving.
- Regulatory context: NONE triggered. No HIPAA, FERPA (upstream), GDPR, CCPA, GLBA, SOX, or PCI DSS exposure.
- Sibling contract: `governance/data-contracts/raw-college-scorecard.yaml` — aligned CDE pattern for `unitid`.

### Columns Flagged as CDE
| Column | Table | Rationale |
|--------|-------|-----------|
| unitid | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Sole join key to downstream consumers (base.college_scorecard_institution, base.college_scorecard, consumable.career_outcomes). Also dedup grain. IPEDS authoritative identifier. |
| control | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Multiplexer that selects NPT4_PUB vs NPT4_PRIV (and the 10 quintile columns) in the Silver transform. Wrong value routes the ROI denominator to the wrong source column. |
| preddeg | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Ingest filter input (PREDDEG=3 OR ICLEVEL=1). Defines the 4-year bachelor's scope of this table. Validates filter correctness. |
| costt4_a | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Primary source of unified cost_of_attendance_annual in Silver (COALESCE with costt4_p). Receipt sticker-price line. BT-110. |
| costt4_p | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Fallback source of unified cost_of_attendance_annual in Silver (program-year institutions). BT-110. |
| npt4_pub | raw.college_scorecard_institution | CRITICAL. Direct source of net_price_annual for public institutions (control=1) — the ROI denominator input. BT-111. |
| npt4_priv | raw.college_scorecard_institution | CRITICAL. Direct source of net_price_annual for private institutions (control IN (2,3)) — the ROI denominator input. BT-111. |
| npt41_pub | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Drives net_price_q1 in Silver for public institutions ($0-$30K income bracket). Income-quintile ROI. BT-112. |
| npt42_pub | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Drives net_price_q2 in Silver for public institutions ($30K-$48K). BT-112. |
| npt43_pub | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Drives net_price_q3 in Silver for public institutions ($48K-$75K — median bracket). BT-112. |
| npt44_pub | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Drives net_price_q4 in Silver for public institutions ($75K-$110K). BT-112. |
| npt45_pub | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Drives net_price_q5 in Silver for public institutions ($110K+). Aid-monotonicity DQ invariant. BT-112. |
| npt41_priv | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Drives net_price_q1 in Silver for private institutions ($0-$30K). BT-112. |
| npt42_priv | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Drives net_price_q2 in Silver for private institutions ($30K-$48K). BT-112. |
| npt43_priv | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Drives net_price_q3 in Silver for private institutions ($48K-$75K). BT-112. |
| npt44_priv | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Drives net_price_q4 in Silver for private institutions ($75K-$110K). BT-112. |
| npt45_priv | raw.college_scorecard_institution | Drives net_price_q5 in Silver for private institutions ($110K+). Aid-monotonicity DQ invariant. BT-112. |
